response: R. D. Reid acted in the remake of *Dawn of the Dead* directed by George A. Romero, not the original version directed by Zack Snyder. He appeared in both the 2004 remake and the 2006 3D remake, but the 2004 version was directed by Zack Snyder, while the 2006 version was a 3D remake of the 1968 classic directed by Tom Savini.
